sections.prose: A workflow symptom can be noticed without yet revealing its system-design cause. A first leadership move follows after distinguishing symptom from cause.

claims.text: A workflow symptom can be noticed without yet revealing its system-design cause.
A first leadership move follows after distinguishing symptom from cause.
